full_text:
The sample consisted of a large piece of omentum tissue with no clearly identifiable tumor tissue. Anastasia had separated a smaller portion from which she took the pieces for the cassettes. I used the leftover from that separated piece.

Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/step) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 3 ml for 5 min + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++. After, RBC lysis the pellet still looked pinkish/brownish so redid the RBC lysis with 2 ml 5 min + 10 ml DMEM/F12+++. Still, after that, the pellet looked more brown compared to the usual white cell pellet. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 ml of media and counted.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

4 vials of 5 E6 cells each were frozen.

Cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.

| | Dispase
1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 13.7
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 8.62
 | viability [%] | 63.0
 | size [µm] | 8.6
2) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 14.6
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 8.55
 | viability [%] | 58.7
 | size [µm] | 8.3
Average | [cells/ml] | 14.2 E6
 | total [cells] | 42.6 E6 in 3 ml
 | viability [%] | 60.85
